key_highlights: US-Iran standoff drives oil higher, causing stocks and bonds to drop globally.
S&P 500 hits all-time highs despite geopolitical tensions, driven by tech and AI optimism.
Apple announces CEO transition: Tim Cook to executive chairman, John Ternus as new CEO.
Nestlé sales rise on coffee and snacks strength, offsetting recall impact.
UnitedHealth Group Q1 earnings show resilience in healthcare sector.
Euro-zone private sector unexpectedly shrinks, signaling economic weakness.
Warren Buffett dumps 77% of Amazon to buy a surging media stock, signaling value shift.
Revolut targets $200B valuation IPO but not until 2028, highlighting fintech growth.
Oil price volatility and Iran peace talks uncertainty dominate macro risks.
Meta to record employee keystrokes for AI training, raising privacy concerns.

sectors.trend: Oil prices surge due to US-Iran standoff and stalled peace talks, with Brent crude likely testing $90+.
sectors.implications: Higher fuel costs pressure airlines (United Airlines cutting capacity), transport, and consumer goods. Energy stocks benefit short-term but volatility is high.

sectors.trend: AI and cloud spending remain strong; ServiceNow subscription revenue up 22% Y/Y; Nokia beats on AI pivot; Apple CEO transition signals continuity.
sectors.implications: Tech sector resilient, but valuations high. AI infrastructure plays (Astera Labs, ServiceNow) outperform. Apple's leadership change is neutral-positive.

sectors.trend: UnitedHealth Group Q1 earnings solid; Roche sales decline on FX headwinds; Intellia and Annexon get buy ratings.
sectors.implications: Healthcare defensive appeal remains, but currency risk for multinationals. Biotech shows selective opportunity.

sectors.trend: Banks and insurers face pressure from rising oil and geopolitical uncertainty; AIG earnings preview cautious; UBS AT1 investors get a win.
sectors.implications: Credit spreads may widen. Insurance renewals worsening. Fintech (Revolut) and exchanges (TMX/Cboe deal) show M&A activity.

sectors.trend: Nestlé sales up on staples; Sainsbury's warns on Middle East conflict profit hit; WH Smith suspends dividend due to Iran war impact.
sectors.implications: Consumer staples defensive, but discretionary exposed to fuel inflation and geopolitical risk. Airlines and retail face headwinds.

sectors.trend: GE Aerospace beats but stock slumps; RTX and Northrop also beat; Apollo nears €1.4B deal for Forvia's interior unit.
sectors.implications: Defense and aerospace strong on Pentagon budget. Auto suppliers face headwinds. M&A in industrials active.

key_themes: Geopolitical risk premium: US-Iran standoff driving oil, safe-haven flows, and market volatility.
AI and tech leadership: Apple CEO transition, ServiceNow growth, Nokia AI pivot, Astera Labs deal with Amazon-Anthropic.
Inflation and fuel costs: Airlines cutting capacity, insurance renewals worsening, fertilizer prices high.
Central bank divergence: Euro-zone contraction vs. US resilience, yuan gaining in FX options trading.
M&A and IPO activity: Revolut targeting $200B valuation, TMX/Cboe deal, Apollo/Forvia, Yangzhou Nanopore IPO.
Regulatory and legal risks: Meta keystroke tracking, NY sues Coinbase/Gemini, FCC fines nonbinding ruling.
Value rotation: Buffett selling Amazon for media stock, suggesting shift from growth to value.
Emerging market stress: Indonesia rupiah falls, Ethiopia exchange adds listing, India fertilizer costs high.

risk_assessment.mitigation: Increase cash allocation, hedge with gold or oil futures, reduce exposure to airlines and consumer discretionary.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Oil price spike and sustained inflation
risk_assessment.mitigation: Overweight energy and defensive sectors, underweight airlines and transport. Consider TIPS or commodity ETFs.
Reduce exposure to European equities, favor US and Asia. Monitor ECB policy response.
Diversify within tech, focus on profitable AI plays (ServiceNow, Nokia), avoid overvalued names.
Hedge FX exposure for multinationals, consider currency-hedged ETFs.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Regulatory crackdown on crypto and prediction markets
risk_assessment.mitigation: Avoid unregulated crypto platforms; monitor NY lawsuit against Coinbase/Gemini.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy energy stocks and oil ETFs on pullbacks
opportunities.rationale: Geopolitical premium likely to persist; oil supply disruption risk supports prices. Energy sector benefits from higher crude.

opportunities.recommendation: Accumulate AI infrastructure plays (ServiceNow, Astera Labs, Nokia)
opportunities.rationale: Strong earnings momentum, AI adoption accelerating, and cloud spending robust. ServiceNow subscription revenue up 22% Y/Y.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy Apple stock on CEO transition
opportunities.rationale: Leadership change is orderly and signals continuity. China iPhone shipments up 20%, strong ecosystem.
Pentagon budget request and geopolitical tensions support defense spending. Both beat earnings.

opportunities.recommendation: Invest in value stocks following Buffett's move
opportunities.rationale: Buffett selling Amazon for media stock signals rotation from growth to value. Look for undervalued media and consumer staples.

defensive_moves.rationale: Geopolitical uncertainty and oil spike warrant liquidity. Short-duration Treasuries reduce duration risk.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge with gold or gold miners
defensive_moves.rationale: Gold is a traditional safe haven amid geopolitical stress and inflation. Gold miners offer leverage.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to airlines and consumer discretionary
defensive_moves.rationale: Fuel costs soaring, United Airlines cutting capacity, Sainsbury's warning on profit hit. Margin compression likely.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Avoid unregulated crypto and prediction market platforms
defensive_moves.rationale: Regulatory actions (NY suing Coinbase/Gemini, Kalshi fines) increase legal risk. Stick to regulated assets.

market_outlook.short_term: Markets will remain volatile with a bearish tilt due to US-Iran tensions and oil price spikes. S&P 500 may correct from all-time highs as risk-off sentiment prevails. Energy and defense will outperform; airlines and consumer discretionary will underperform. Euro-zone weakness adds downside risk.
market_outlook.long_term: If US-Iran de-escalates, markets could rally sharply, with tech and AI leading. However, persistent inflation and higher fuel costs may slow global growth. The Apple CEO transition and strong AI earnings provide a positive structural backdrop. Emerging markets face headwinds from strong dollar and oil prices.
key_catalysts: US-Iran peace talks outcome (next 48 hours critical)
Oil price direction (Brent above $90 could trigger broader sell-off)
Federal Reserve and ECB policy signals (inflation vs. growth)
Big Tech earnings (Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon next week)
Pentagon budget details and defense spending
China stimulus measures and yuan internationalization
watch_list: Brent crude oil price and Iran negotiation updates
S&P 500 and VIX levels (volatility expected to rise)
US dollar index (DXY) and emerging market currencies (IDR, INR)
10-year Treasury yield (impact of oil on inflation expectations)
Apple stock reaction to CEO transition
ServiceNow and Astera Labs post-earnings momentum
United Airlines capacity cuts and airline sector
Norway sovereign wealth fund performance (tech slide impact)
